reviews.review_title: Fun game with an exercise bonus
reviews.review_description:
i could see the grandkids liking this game and getting a good workout in without even knowing they are working out.
there needs to be a better warning sign (audio) when the spears and axes are coming. Like a 3 beep countdown before the axe is thrown. i was focusing so much on punching the dragons that i missed hearing the axes come in almost every time.
great start. i look forward to seeing how it develops

This game is a potentially entertaining addition to my VR workout. The dragons are too close and block your view of incoming axes making them difficult to dodge. I liked the opportunity to upgrade my gloves, helmet and shielding, but the free version did not last very long, so I didn't get to do much of that.  It definitely got the heart pumping and the body moving, but would probably get boring quickly. Not yet something I would consider paying for.

developer_response.body:
HI ibyula, thank you for the thoughtful and helpful feedback.  You are the first reviewer of my first game ever!  I was also concerned that the dragons might be too close and/or might block the view of the axes.  It would help me to know: DId you play sitting or standing?  Also I wasn’t sure we were giving enough time to play for free and I’m wondering if I should allow more play without a subscription.  I still want people to keep playing even if they don’t want to pay for it.  Does the 2 hour cooldown between free battles seem longer than it should be?
Could you please email me at bella@jdarcstudios.com

reviews.review_description: I like fitness apps so I had to try this game It's pretty basic but fun.  I think if I have 4 or more creatures coming at me at one I'd like them to advance more slowly so that I can actually box and not start flaying my arms so can hit them before the kill me. Perhaps the sword will help. Then there's the problem of not always seeing when an axe is being thrown at me. Still its fun.
The game is fun, but stopped working at level 38.

developer_response.body:
Hello strgiostri,
Thank you for alerting us!!  This is fixed in the most recent update.
